'''HH-4 grenade launchers''' were support units manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]]<ref name="BF I guide" /> in use by certain [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]<ref name="BF I" /> and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] warriors working with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Grenade launcher/Legends|launchers]] had a capacity of five [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]], which were set on a timer and were capable of taking out a small [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] squad.<ref name="BFII">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The HH-4 launcher appears in the [[Star Wars Battlefront (series)|''Star Wars: Battlefront'']] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series.
